name: Qiniu

dataUsage.retentionPolicy: The privacy policy states that account information is used during the service period and, upon account cancellation, personal information will be deleted or anonymized. No product-specific retention period for AI inference inputs/outputs or logs was found in the reviewed primary sources.

notes: Qiniu is headquartered in China and the reviewed primary sources show AI inference API endpoints and company operations centered in China, with no EU-region or EU-only processing commitment found. No public DPA/AVV, sub-processor list, SCC statement, or explicit statement on training on customer API data was found in the reviewed primary sources, so those fields are left null or marked unavailable.
